channel.title: Laptops on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA A+ (220-1201): Mobile Devices
item.category: "CompTIA A+ Course" , "Mobile Devices" , "Laptops" , "Hardware Fundamentals" , "IT Support" , "CompTIA Certification" , "Help Desk" , "Smartphones" , "Tablets" , "Computer Hardware"
item.description: Master mobile devices for the CompTIA A+ 220-1201 Core 1 exam. Learn laptop hardware, accessories and connectivity, network connectivity, MDM, and mobile synchronization.
